implementation of the effect of the CharacterCard 5 and the CharacterCard 6; at the end increase the price of the CharacterCard

implementation of the effect of the CharacterCard 9, the CharacterCard 11 and the CharacterCard 12; at the end increase the price of the CharacterCard

implement the effect of the characterCard n°1

implementation of the effect of the CharacterCard 7 and the CharacterCard 10; at the end increase the price of the CharacterCard
